message:
feat(fp-columnar): add Column rank + searchsorted parity (frankenpandas-sqgz)

Ranking:
  rank(method, ascending) matches pd.Series.rank(method=..., ascending=...).
  Supports average / min / max / first / dense tie handling. Missing
  inputs stay missing (na_option='keep'). Result dtype is Float64 so
  'average' can emit non-integer values. Unknown methods return
  ColumnError::Type.

Searchsorted:
  searchsorted(value, side) matches pd.Series.searchsorted(value, side).
  Binary-searches the assumed-ascending column; 'left' gives the first
  insertion position and 'right' gives the last. Trailing missing
  slots compare greater than any needle (consistent with sort_values
  na_position='last'). Missing needles or invalid sides are rejected.

Also closes duplicate beads frankenpandas-tihp (sort_values+argsort,
already shipped in 3f490e1) and frankenpandas-4n8y (duplicated,
already shipped in 3f490e1) and clears a needless_range_loop clippy
warning introduced by the rank grouping loop.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.7 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
